message:
fix: move auto-push state to local file, preventing metadata merge conflicts (GH#2466)

The dolt_auto_push_last and dolt_auto_push_commit values are machine-local
but were stored in the Dolt metadata table, causing recurring merge conflicts
on multi-machine setups and dirtying the working set before pulls (GH#2474).

Moves auto-push tracking to .beads/push-state.json (gitignored, never enters
Dolt history). Old metadata rows are harmless and left in place.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
